title: White 8" Teddy Bear T-Shirt
features: Fits most Webkinz and Shining Star Animals
Fits most 8"-10" Make Your Own Stuffed Animal kit animals
description: Adorable clothes for your stuffed cuddle toys measuring approximately 8"-10" including most made by Webkinz, Shining Stars and most brands of stuff your own animal kits. These outfits do not include any online codes and do not fit 8" Teenie Teddies, Fluff Factory animals or Ty Beanie Babies animals. For that size animals, please purchase Teenie Teddies outfits.
